creator: robert.ayrapetyan@gmail.com
text:
Periodically, when performing activity in chromium, PC freezes and only hard-reset resolves the issue. This has started to happen recently after upgrade from 6x to 71.

I'm able to reproduce it at least once per day performing following steps:
1. VNC to remote desktop PC (having built-in Intel video card, maybe it matters)
2. Run Chromium there and open > 10 tabs
3. Perform some activity in a heavy JS app (e.g. in gmail)

Remote PC freezes, VNC session interrupts, PC doesn't respond to mouse movements and keyboard activity locally.

There are no coredumps, no errors in Xorg.0.log or /var/log/messages.

Where else can I look?
Thanks.
